entities.name: UNDERUTILISED CROPS
entities.description: Crops that are not widely used in food systems and are important for diversification

entities.name: FOOD SYSTEMS
entities.description: The complex network of activities involved in the production, processing, and distribution of food

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism, used here to promote underutilised crops

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of producing offspring with desired traits to improve crop performance

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING STRATEGIES
entities.description: Plans to develop and strengthen the skills and resources needed for agricultural improvement

entities.name: MAJOR CROPS
entities.description: Crops that are widely cultivated and consumed globally, providing genomic advances
